step_rationale: Lipoprotein transporter; hepatic LDL uptake and cholesterol metabolism.
mechanism: SLCO1B1 encodes a transporter regulating LDL-cholesterol clearance and atherogenic lipoprotein levels.

references.title: Mapping gene and gene pathways associated with coronary artery disease: a CARDIoGRAM exome and multi-ancestry UK biobank analysis.
